name: browser-automation
description: AI browser automation MCP — Stagehand-powered act/observe/extract, scenarios, and scripted flows.

model_api_key.title: Model API key
model_api_key.description: API key for the LLM that Stagehand calls (Gemini by default; also supports OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.). Required for any agentic tool call.

model_name.title: Model name
model_name.description: LiteLLM-format model ID, e.g. google/gemini-3-flash-preview, openai/gpt-4o, anthropic/claude-haiku-4-5.

browserbase_api_key.title: Browserbase API key
browserbase_api_key.description: Only needed when creating sessions with cloud=true. Pass cloud=true to stagehand_session_create to use Browserbase instead of local Playwright.

browserbase_project_id.title: Browserbase project ID
browserbase_project_id.description: Project ID that pairs with the Browserbase API key.
